name: mini-jira-image-resizer
description: S3-triggered image thumbnail Lambda for Mini-Jira on AWS.

scripts.package:lambda: npm run clean && npm run install:lambda && npm run zip
scripts.zip: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path image-resizer.zip) { Remove-Item image-resizer.zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path index.js,package.json,package-lock.json,node_modules -DestinationPath image-resizer.zip -Force"
